---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new mechanic, system, or capability
title: "feat: "
labels: feature
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why does this belong in Emoji Life? What problem does it solve or what emergent behavior does it enable?

## Proposed behavior

Describe how the feature should work. Include any relevant mechanics, agent interactions, or UI changes.

## Affected domains

Which domains would this touch? (e.g. Agent, Faction, World, Rendering, UI)

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, tech spec sections, or design notes.
